title: Little Maid: Mood Flutter
description: Added an emotion value to the Touhou Little maid's maid.
body:
Mod Introduction: Little Maid: Mood Flutter

Little Maid: Mood Flutter is an engaging add-on for the popular Touhou Little Maid mod, introducing a dynamic emotional system to your maids! Unlike the original affection mechanic, this mod adds a hidden "Mood Value" (0-180) that influences your maid’s behavior. The higher the value, the angrier she becomes—and you can’t see the exact number, only her mood level in the maid info menu.

Mood changes aren’t straightforward: happiness and anger multipliers vary based on her current state. When content, she gains affection and may even gift you presents upon waking. But push her too far, and and she might go on strike or even attack you in melee combat if her mood exceeds 120!

From working and taking damage to sleeping and eating, every action affects her emotions. Manage her well to avoid penalties—like reduced dialogue or strikes—and enjoy benefits like faster affection growth. Perfect for players who want deeper interaction with their maids beyond simple chores!

![Maid Attack Owner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8901e438a0bc2373f3c9b1fd083f211c238fcdf.gif)
